effects.effect: Play this card as a Vivosaur into one of your Vivosaur zones (150LP/Neutral/MID/[Machine]) with this ability:

effects.name: Support Charge
effects.effect: Neither player can apply statuses to this Vivosaur. Neither player gets a KO Point if this Vivosaur is defeated. You can discard 1 card and rest this Vivosaur; Deal 50 damage to an opponent's Vivosaur and heal 50 damage to a Vivosaur you control.
